---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case
Describe the Azure DevOps workflow problem you're trying to solve or the use case this feature would enable.

## Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Is this:**
- [ ] A new tool
- [ ] An enhancement to existing tool
- [ ] A new composite workflow
- [ ] Better error handling
- [ ] Improved response format

## Which Azure DevOps API?
If proposing a new tool, which ADO API would it use? (Git, Work Item Tracking, Build, etc.)

## Alternative Solutions
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Agent Impact
How would this feature improve the AI agent experience? (Since this is an LLM-optimized MCP)
- Better workflows?
- Reduced round trips?
- Richer context?

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.
